---
title: "The Rev. Robert Campbell Moberly"
---

## The Rev. Robert Campbell Moberly

**Dates:** (26 July 1845-8 June 1903)

### Description

third son of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly, theologian

### Biography

He was an undergraduate at New College in 1866. He married (29 June 1880) Alice Sidney Kerr Hamilton (d. 1939).  He taught theology in Oxford and became Vicar of Great Budworth in 1880.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 1 [1900]
- Letter from Aug 23d [1893?]
- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from May 1866
- Letter from [July 1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
